arts.ttl: David Moyes opens up on his time at Man United and reveals their 'biggest problem' as Everton boss prepares to face his former club at Goodison Park
arts.sum: David Moyes says Man United started to lose their 'values' around the time he was at the club - and their struggles since his sacking have helped rationalise his performance as Old Trafford manager.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warned he's giving 'weak-minded' Man Utd players an excuse with tactics
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim continues to stick with his preferred 3-4-2-1 formation, despite Manchester United only winning four of their 14 Premier League games since he took charge

arts.ttl: Moyes claims he wanted to ‘fight the world’ as Manchester United manager
arts.sum: Scot is preparing Everton to face his former club Moyes says he is ‘a bit calmer’ now than earlier in career David Moyes has said he wanted to “fight the world” when he first joined Everton and Manchester United but his calmer demeanour today should not be mistaken for a drop in passion. The Everton manager insists it will be just another game when he faces United at Goodison Park on Saturday having competed against his former club several times with West Ham. Moyes was sacked only 10 months after succeeding Sir Alex Ferguson at Old Trafford and described the setback as “part of life as a football manager. You have to find a way back and that’s what I had to do after the disappointment of losing my job at Manchester United.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'It's quite simple' - Ruben Amorim makes damning David Moyes claim ahead of Man United vs Everton
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Goodison Park on Saturday with Ruben Amorim's side below the Toffees in the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim's embargoed press conference
arts.sum: You said you stick to your idea but you haven't always played [the back five] as, in your first job at Casa Pia, you started with a back four and then moved to this. I see principles and we can change the system, this way of playing, and we can adapt to a different system.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits David Moyes is doing a better job than him
arts.sum: Moyes, who was sacked by United in 2014 after replacing Sir Alex Ferguson, has won as many matches as Amorim since returning to Everton

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes a shocking admission about the job he has done at Man United as he prepares to face David Moyes' rejuvenated Everton
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ruben Amorim admits David Moyes is doing a better job at reviving Everton than he has managed at Manchester United. Moyes has won four of his six Premier League games.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals he's questioned Man Utd position and denies Sir Jim Ratcliffe theory
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wanted to wait until the end of this season before swapping Sporting Lisbon for Manchester United but he was convinced after talks with INEOS and arrived in November

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Everton: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without Amad Diallo, Lisandro Martínez, Kobbie Mainoo and Manuel Ugarte vs. Everton.

arts.ttl: Former Man United ace Angel Gomes major transfer decision announced amid expiring Lille contract
arts.sum: Former Manchester United midfielder Angel Gomes is set to become a free agent in the summer with a string of clubs likely to chase his signature
